sentences.translation: Poslovica kaže: «Stanovnici Mekke bolje poznaju njene klance».
sentences.translationEn: The proverb says: «The people of Mecca know its paths better».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ أَصْحَابَ الْخِبْرَةِ هُمُ الأَجْدَرُ بِالْمَشُورَةِ.
sentences.translation: To znači da su iskusni ljudi najprimjereniji za savjet.
sentences.translationEn: This means that experienced people are most fit to give advice.

sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ تَوْفِيقٌ السَّفَرَ إِلَى مَدِينَةٍ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Tawfik je htio putovati u novi grad.
sentences.translationEn: Tawfiq wanted to travel to a new city.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ صَدِيقًا يَعِيشُ هُنَاكَ فَأَعْطَاهُ أَفْضَلَ النَّصَائِحِ.
sentences.translation: Pitao je prijatelja koji živi tamo i ovaj mu je dao najboIje savjete.
sentences.translationEn: He asked a friend who lives there and he gave him the best advice.
